subcodes.first_line: The servant testifieth that there is no God but Him. He hath ever been and shall forever be as He hath ever been, subsequent to his confession [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان و یکون بمثل ما قد کان بعد اعترافه
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @consultation, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
